# Icon

A wrapper component for rendering SVG icons with consistent sizing and color. Used to display icons from icon libraries or custom SVG icons.

## Import

```jsx
import { Icon } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `as` | `React.ElementType` | - | The icon component to render (e.g., from `react-icons` or `lucide-react`) |
| `size` | `string` | - | The size of the icon (e.g., `"sm"`, `"md"`, `"lg"`, `"xl"`, or a CSS value) |
| `color` | `string` | `"currentColor"` | The color of the icon |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | SVG content when rendering inline SVG |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

All standard Chakra UI style props are also supported.

## Usage

### With an icon library component

```jsx
import { LuSearch } from "react-icons/lu";

<Icon as={LuSearch} />
```

### With custom size

```jsx
<Icon as={LuHeart} size="lg" />
<Icon as={LuStar} boxSize="24px" />
```

### With custom color

```jsx
<Icon as={LuAlertCircle} color="red.500" />
<Icon as={LuCheckCircle} color="green.500" />
```

### Inline in text

```jsx
<Text>
  Click the <Icon as={LuSettings} /> icon to open settings.
</Text>
```

### With inline SVG

```jsx
<Icon viewBox="0 0 24 24" boxSize="24px">
  <path
    fill="currentColor"
    d="M12 2L2 22h20L12 2z"
  />
</Icon>
```

### Different sizes

```jsx
<Icon as={LuHome} size="sm" />
<Icon as={LuHome} size="md" />
<Icon as={LuHome} size="lg" />
<Icon as={LuHome} size="xl" />
```

## Features

- Renders SVG icons with consistent sizing and color
- Supports icon components from libraries like `lucide-react` and `react-icons` via the `as` prop
- Supports inline SVG content via `children`
- Defaults to `currentColor` so the icon inherits text color
- Supports all Chakra UI style props for additional customization
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
